findings.problem: Sanitization drift in the final third: the chapter moves from volatile mother-daughter consequence into procedural recitation (numbered terms, legal-email workflow, abstract moral wrap-up). That summary-and-policy mode functions as a safety valve that defuses narrative danger right after the paternity/overdose disclosures.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:247, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:253, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:339, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:351, replace policy-list exposition with contested scene action. Keep the boundary decision, but make at least one term actively fought over on-page, then show one immediate human cost of the chosen boundary (family, legal, sobriety, or relationship) before chapter close.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:247 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:339 removes numbered policy recital and includes (1) one on-page disagreement that changes a boundary term, and (2) one immediate consequence rendered in scene (speech/action/sensory detail) by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:351. FAIL if the ending still resolves through abstract wrap-up language alone.

findings.problem: Timidity: the craving threat is named but mostly handled by reported status updates and text logistics, so the prose retreats from the embodied risk the chapter itself establishes.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:329, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:343, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:353, add one step-by-step sobriety pressure beat (urge escalation plus counteraction) instead of only summarizing that she did not drink and might attend a meeting.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:329 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:343 shows one concrete, time-bound recovery action on-page (for example: live call with sponsor, entering a meeting room, or physically interrupting access to alcohol) with sensory friction and a plausible failure point before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:353. FAIL if sobriety management remains only in declarative report text.

findings.problem: Register convergence and stiffness under pressure: key exchanges slide into polished thesis lines, and both speakers can sound interchangeable in syntax/rhythm. This blunts idiolect separation and pushes some beats toward courtroom formality instead of lived speech.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:173, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:193, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:215, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:321, re-separate voices: Marisol (high-contraction, image-driven pressure talk) versus Gloria (compact command tone with practical proof). Convert unmotivated full-form lines to contractions unless deliberately emphatic, and add interruption/overlap beats where leverage shifts.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised exchange anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:173 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:305 gives each speaker at least one interrupted/cut-off line, Marisol uses contractions in at least 3 of her first 4 rebuttal turns after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:173, and Gloria anchors at least 2 rebuttals in mundane practical detail by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:321. FAIL if the exchange still reads as interchangeable polished maxims.

findings.problem: Recurring formula/tic: anaphoric negation and parallel-binary constructions repeat beyond twice (for example repeated clause stems and paired oppositions), flattening cadence into manifesto rhythm at emotional peaks.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:103, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:245, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:351, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:352, keep only one deliberate repetition per beat and vary sentence architecture with concrete scene motion or sensory image rather than stacked abstract parallels.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised targeted spans at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:103, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:245, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:351 contain no clause stem repeated more than twice consecutively (for example no triple identical starter like 'He chose it because' and no chained paired starters like 'They let... They let... They left... They left...'), while preserving emotional force through specific imagery. FAIL if the same repetitive templates remain.

findings.problem: Dramatic economy leak: the chapter repeats documentary-inventory/explainer material in multiple passes, reducing uncertainty and leverage in a scene that should rely on revelation pressure rather than restated thesis.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress duplicate inventory beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:23 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:39, then repurpose space at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:173 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:247 for new resistance, withholding, or tactical reversal before agreement.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised opening anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:23 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:39 has only one documentary-inventory pass before confirmation at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:53, and revised negotiation after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:173 adds at least one new contested fact or leverage shift by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:247. FAIL if multiple inventory summaries remain and negotiation proceeds without new resistance.

summary: Chapter 17 lands required continuity beats (boardwalk two-hander, paternity confirmation, ethical-boundary decision) and stays in canonical past tense, but it does not clear review due to one HIGH craft issue (sanitization via procedural safety-valve ending) plus MEDIUM timidity, dialogue register convergence, recurring prose formulas, and repeated thesis/inventory exposition that lowers dramatic pressure.
